sections.title: Call of Dragons Honor Membership Summary
sections.content:
There are 15 total levels of Honor Membership in Call of Dragons at the moment, but we will surely get more levels soon in the future.

At each Honor Membership, there is 1 exclusive Honor Chest for you to purchase, which is always worth the money and would give you access to some exclusive heroes. For example, the first Honor chest levels give you access to Liliya , which is super powerful at just 5-1-1-1 (first skill maxed).

Players are able to get many free Honor points while playing the game, but If you want to to push to level 8, you want to spend Gems to purchase the level.

Getting Honor Level is still the top priority when using Gems in Call of Dragons at the moment.

sections.title: Get To Honor Membership Level 8 As Soon As Possible!
sections.content:
Reaching Honor level 8 should be the priority for any new player.

It’s not too difficult to achieve, even if you are a free-to-play player.

All you need is 75,300 gems in total to get to Honor level 8, which you can get easily by completing different quests, tasks, and events while playing the game.

It might take a few weeks to get there, but you will eventually.

Make sure to spend all your gems on getting to Honor level 8, not anywhere else, to unlock the secondary Technology research queue. In addition, you’ll be rewarded with a free Legendary Hero Token every day of your choice. Legendary heroes are incredibly powerful, so make sure you take advantage of this.

You’ll also get two epic hero tokens at level 7, which are great for new players, as well as additional resources.

If you need more gems to level up your VIP status, don’t forget to redeem all available Call of Dragons promo codes .

sections.title: Honorary Membership (VIP) Store
sections.content:
Another benefit of upgrading your Honorary Membership level is that It allows you to purchase multiple exclusive items from the Honorary Store with normal resources such as Gold, Wood, Ore, and Gems.

It’s recommended to purchase CP Recovery, Speedups, Epic Medals, and Legendary Medals with Gold, Wood, and Ore
